The game gets through the initial setup menus, but says "Something went wrong when trying to connect to the internet", and I'm unable to add the required PSN account to play the game. The only option presented to me at that point is to quit the game. Not sure if this is a Proton limitation, but whatever part of the game is responsible for reaching out to Sony's servers cannot function under Linux. 

Thanks Sony
